_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — lives under examples/ so the reconciler ignores it (it only reads monad/**). Copy into monad/outputs/ and wire into a pipeline to use. Shows the GitHub-secrets pass-through convention: a secret value of the form 'env:VAR_NAME' is resolved at APPLY time from the environment variable VAR_NAME, which the apply workflow populates from a GitHub Actions secret of the same name. Secret VALUES never live in git.
name: Elasticsearch (real)
description: Example real destination with a secret pass-through.
